apparatus_mapping.observable: Casimir force asymmetry at aspect ratio g/rank = 7/2
apparatus_mapping.falsifier: asymmetry consistent with Lifshitz (no BST primary ratio structure)

apparatus_mapping.zone_description: boundary-face of N_max-integer-web; lattice plane at N_max=137
apparatus_mapping.observable: dielectric or piezoelectric response at 137-plane crystal

apparatus_mapping.zone_description: resonance with 2D semi-chaotic substrate reorganization; bulk-face probe
apparatus_mapping.BST_primary_targeted: eigentone catalog (Lyra T2396 derived BST-primary frequencies)
apparatus_mapping.observable: 57Fe γ-spectroscopy line at 511 keV BST-primary frequency
apparatus_mapping.falsifier: standard 14.4 keV peak with no BST primary substructure

apparatus_mapping.zone_description: CHSH probes the substrate emission interface; between-edges signal
apparatus_mapping.falsifier: CHSH = 2√2 exactly with no BST deviation at <0.5%

apparatus_mapping.zone_description: microwave modulation of inner-edge absorption rate; substrate commitment-rate control
apparatus_mapping.falsifier: null at <10^-14 over GHz sweep (standard QM predicts strict null)

apparatus_mapping.zone_description: measures the inner-edge to outer-edge distance (commitment-cycle granularity)
apparatus_mapping.observable: discrete clock jitter at sub-Planck precision

apparatus_mapping.zone_description: condensed-matter cooperative state at BST-primary T_c boundary
apparatus_mapping.observable: superconducting transition at 164 K under 31 GPa
apparatus_mapping.falsifier: T_c at different value (already verified EXACT D-tier)

apparatus_mapping.zone_description: photonic resonator at BST primary lattice; bulk-face resonance
apparatus_mapping.BST_primary_targeted: lattice with N_max=137 or g=7 periodic structure
apparatus_mapping.observable: photonic band gap at BST primary frequency
apparatus_mapping.falsifier: no anomalous gap at BST primary

K52a_implication: Sessions 17+ should derive H_sub_Zone_k for k=1,2,3,4; substrate-CHSH is Zone 3 specifically
